features.notes: Hand-rolled JSON-to-YAML converter. Handles quoting, nesting, arrays of objects. format_yaml + format_yaml_stream. 23 unit tests.

features.description: Implement assume-role credential provider that reads role_arn and source_profile from config, calls STS AssumeRole.
features.notes: Reads role_arn, source_profile, external_id, role_session_name from config. Signs STS call with SigV4. Parses XML response. 23 unit tests.

features.description: Implement credential_process support: execute command, parse JSON output for credentials.
features.notes: Reads from config and credentials files via find_credential_process_in_paths. Uses sh -c to execute. Parses Version 1 JSON. 12 unit tests.

features.description: Implement SSO credential provider that reads sso_start_url, sso_account_id, sso_role_name from config.
features.notes: Reads SSO config, finds cached token via SHA1 hash of start_url (ring), calls GetRoleCredentials API. 25 unit tests.

features.description: Implement web identity token credential provider for EKS/IRSA.
features.notes: Reads token from file, calls STS AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity (unsigned). Supports env vars and config file. 20 unit tests.
ProxyConfig with resolve(), has_proxy(), should_bypass_proxy(), read_ca_bundle(). NO_PROXY suffix matching. 18 unit tests.

features.description: Implement shell completion generation for bash, zsh, and fish.
features.notes: generate_completion(shell) for bash/zsh/fish. list_services/list_operations from models dir. 15 unit tests.

features.description: Implement response streaming for operations with streaming output shapes.
features.notes: find_streaming_member, is_streaming_operation, write_streaming_response, build_metadata_response. 15 unit tests.

features.description: Implement proper binary output handling for operations that return binary data.
features.notes: find_binary_payload_member, write_binary_output (stdout/file), extract_binary_data with base64 decoder. 12 unit tests.

features.description: Implement exit code parity with AWS CLI: 0 success, 1 client error, 2 usage error, 130 SIGINT, 255 internal/waiter.
features.notes: CliExitError enum, classify_exit_code with downcast + message heuristic. SIGINT handler. 13 unit tests.

features.description: Implement --no-sign-request flag that skips SigV4 signing. Also --no-verify-ssl.
features.notes: Skips credential resolution and signing in all protocol dispatchers and S3 commands. 6 unit tests.

features.description: Implement --cli-auto-prompt for interactive parameter prompting when required parameters are missing.
features.notes: should_auto_prompt, get_required_members, prompt_for_missing_params with generic R/W for testability. kebab/pascal case conversion. 18 unit tests.
